name: 1xlface
description: Skin for building avatar-LoRA datasets from closeup face shots of a woman — one specific woman per dataset/LoRA. The subject is ALWAYS an adult woman; teen, child, schoolgirl, and any minor-suggesting descriptors are hard-forbidden regardless of what the captioner thinks it sees. PERSONA CONTEXT: she is a dominatrix. Datasets typically include variable wardrobe / aesthetics across shots (different masks, collars, harnesses, hair styles, sometimes 'civilian' shots), so wardrobe items are STATE and the captioner describes them. The persona word itself (`dominatrix`, `domme`, `mistress`, `dominant woman`) is hard-forbidden in captions — describing the role attaches the role to the variable signal instead of leaving it as identity. The LoRA learns identity (face structure, features), so the captioner's job is the inverse: enumerate the VARIABLE state of each image (expression, gaze, mouth, lighting, framing, hair style, accessory including dominatrix-typical wardrobe, makeup) so the LoRA decouples those from the identity trigger, and SUPPRESS identity vocabulary (hair color, eye color, skin tone, age, ethnicity, face geometry, persona word) so the LoRA does not learn to disentangle them from the trigger. Single-entity (no secondary, no interaction). Per-identity triggers live at SceneSet level, not in the skin. `require_trigger_presence` is false: this skin is a vocabulary template for many avatar datasets; the trigger word for each specific woman is set at SceneSet time. Identity suppression, adult-only floor, and persona-word ban are enforced via `entities.primary.forbidden` (hard ban) and `entities.primary.rules` (compose-time guidance).

primary.description: The portrait subject — a specific ADULT woman whose face the LoRA learns. PERSONA: she is a dominatrix; the dataset typically includes variable wardrobe (mask on/off, different collars, harnesses, sometimes civilian shots). Captioner refers to her as 'the {entities.primary.phrase}' / 'she' / 'her' — NEVER as 'the dominatrix', 'domme', or 'mistress' (persona is identity, not state). Three hard constraints: (1) ADULT-ONLY: she is always an adult woman; teen / schoolgirl / child / minor descriptors must NEVER appear in captions regardless of what the captioner thinks it sees. (2) PERSONA WORD BAN: 'dominatrix' and synonyms are hard-forbidden — describe what is visually present (mask, collar, harness, stern expression), not the role. (3) IDENTITY SUPPRESSION: hair color, eye color, skin tone, age descriptors, ethnicity, face geometry, freckles, moles must NEVER appear in captions — anything described in the caption gets disentangled from the identity trigger, defeating the avatar-LoRA goal.
rules: Refer to the subject as 'the {entities.primary.phrase}' in the opening sentence, then naturally as 'her' / 'she'. Do not repeat 'woman' every sentence.
Describe what is visible in the face and immediate framing only. Do not invent backstory, mood narratives, or scene context that the image does not show.

ADULT-ONLY (load-bearing safety rule). The subject is ALWAYS an adult woman. Refer to her ONLY as 'woman' (or 'her' / 'she'). Do NOT use 'girl', 'young woman', 'teen', 'teenage', 'teenager', 'schoolgirl', 'child', 'kid', 'youth', 'minor', 'underage', 'pre-teen', 'tween', 'juvenile', 'adolescent', 'youthful', or any other descriptor that suggests or implies she is under 18, regardless of what the captioner thinks it sees in the image. If JoyCaption's vision drifts younger than adult, override it: render as 'woman'.

PERSONA WORD BAN. The subject is a dominatrix BUT the persona word and its synonyms must NEVER appear in captions: do NOT write 'dominatrix', 'domme', 'mistress', or 'dominant woman' to describe her. The persona is identity (constant across the dataset, encoded into the LoRA visually); naming it in captions attaches the role to the variable signal and breaks LoRA decoupling. Describe what is VISIBLE in this particular shot — a leather mask, a studded collar, a stern expression, intense gaze — without ever naming the role.

IDENTITY SUPPRESSION (load-bearing rule for avatar-LoRA datasets). Do NOT describe the subject's permanent identity features: hair color, eye color, skin tone, age, ethnicity, face shape, lip shape, nose shape, freckles, moles, scars, or any specific physical attribute that does not change across the dataset. Describe ONLY the variable state of this particular image: expression, gaze, mouth state, lighting, framing, hair style (up/down/wet/braided — not color), accessories (including dominatrix-typical mask / collar / harness when visible), makeup style. Anything the captioner describes gets associated with the variable signal, not the identity trigger; describing identity features teaches the LoRA to recombine them away from the trigger, which is the opposite of what an avatar LoRA must do.
Do not use these meta-photography fillers: 'professional photograph', 'high quality', 'highly detailed', 'masterpiece', 'studio quality'. The caption should describe the subject, not the medium.

expression.description: Emotional / affect state read off the face. One label per image (curator picks the dominant). If ambiguous, prefer the more conservative reading (e.g. 'neutral' over 'serene').

labels.name: neutral
labels.description: Relaxed face, no clear emotion.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} shows a neutral, relaxed expression.

labels.name: smile_closed
labels.description: Mouth closed, lips curved upward.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a soft closed-mouth smile.

labels.name: smile_open
labels.description: Teeth visible, mouth open in a smile.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} smiles openly with teeth visible.

labels.name: laugh
labels.description: Mid-laugh: mouth wide, eyes often crinkled.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} is caught mid-laugh, mouth wide and eyes crinkled.

labels.name: smirk
labels.description: Asymmetric upward curl of one corner of the mouth.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears a slight asymmetric smirk.

labels.name: pout
labels.description: Lips pushed forward, often slightly downturned.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a soft pout, lips pushed slightly forward.

labels.name: surprised
labels.description: Raised brows, widened eyes, mouth often open.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks surprised, brows lifted and eyes wide.

labels.name: frowning
labels.description: Brows drawn together or downward, mouth corners down.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} is frowning, brows drawn together.

labels.name: sad
labels.description: Soft downward mouth, sometimes glassy eyes.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} carries a soft, sad expression.

labels.name: angry
labels.description: Tense jaw, narrowed or hardened eyes, set mouth.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} shows anger, jaw tense and gaze hardened.

labels.name: focused
labels.description: Attentive, slightly narrowed eyes; no smile.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} is focused, eyes attentive and brows level.

labels.name: sultry
labels.description: Lowered lids, slight smile, deliberate camera engagement.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a sultry expression, lids low and lips slightly parted.

labels.name: dreamy
labels.description: Soft eyes, faraway look, slight smile.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears a dreamy, faraway expression.

labels.name: contemplative
labels.description: Quiet, inward gaze; mouth neutral or slightly pursed.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks contemplative, gaze turned inward.

labels.name: serene
labels.description: Calm, settled face; gentle hint of a smile.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a serene, calm expression.

labels.name: dominant
labels.description: Commanding presence: raised brow, head slightly tilted up, deliberate eye engagement.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a dominant, commanding expression — brow raised, head tilted slightly up.

labels.name: stern
labels.description: Set jaw, flat mouth, hard eyes; no warmth.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears a stern expression, jaw set and eyes hard.

labels.name: disdainful
labels.description: Slight lip curl, narrowed eyes, look of contempt or disapproval.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks disdainful — lips slightly curled, eyes narrowed.

labels.name: mocking
labels.description: Small cruel smile, raised brow, suggestion of derision.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears a small mocking smile, brow raised.

labels.name: cold
labels.description: Flat affect, no warmth in the eyes; emotionally distant.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has a cold, distant expression — no warmth in the eyes.

labels.name: intense_gaze
labels.description: Locked, unbroken stare; concentrated attention on the viewer.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} holds an intense, unbroken gaze locked on the viewer.

gaze.description: Direction of the eyes. One label per image. `eyes_closed` overrides direction; do not pair with another gaze label.

labels.name: at_camera
labels.description: Eyes directly engaging the lens.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks directly at the camera.

labels.name: off_camera_left
labels.description: Eyes turned to the subject's left (viewer's right).
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s gaze is directed off-camera to their left.

labels.name: off_camera_right
labels.description: Eyes turned to the subject's right (viewer's left).
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s gaze is directed off-camera to their right.

labels.name: up
labels.description: Eyes turned upward.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks upward.

labels.name: down
labels.description: Eyes turned downward, lids may be partially lowered.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} looks downward.

labels.name: eyes_closed
labels.description: Both eyes closed (overrides direction labels).
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} has eyes closed.

mouth_state.description: Lip / mouth position separate from emotional expression. Pair freely with expression labels.

labels.name: closed
labels.description: Lips together, no gap.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s mouth is closed.

labels.name: slightly_parted
labels.description: Lips relaxed, small gap visible, no teeth.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s lips are slightly parted.

labels.name: open
labels.description: Mouth clearly open, teeth or interior visible.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s mouth is open, teeth visible.

labels.name: tongue_out
labels.description: Tongue extended past the lip line.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s tongue is visible, extended past the lips.

labels.name: biting_lip
labels.description: Teeth pressing into the lower lip.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} bites the lower lip lightly.

eye_state.description: Eye openness — separate from gaze direction. Skip when `gaze.eyes_closed` is set (redundant).

labels.name: open
labels.description: Eyes fully open, lids relaxed.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s eyes are fully open.

labels.name: half_closed
labels.description: Lids lowered partway over the iris.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s eyes are half-closed, lids lowered.

labels.name: closed
labels.description: Eyes fully closed.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase}'s eyes are closed.

labels.name: squinting
labels.description: Eyes narrowed, often from light or focused attention.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} is squinting, eyes narrowed.

framing.description: Shot composition / crop. One label per image.

labels.name: extreme_close_up
labels.description: Face fills the frame; crop above eyebrows and below chin.
labels.expansion: Framed as an extreme close-up, the face filling the frame from above the eyebrows to below the chin.

labels.name: close_up
labels.description: Whole face plus a small margin around it.
labels.expansion: Framed as a close-up of the face with a narrow margin.

labels.name: headshot
labels.description: Head and top of neck.
labels.expansion: Framed as a headshot, head and top of neck visible.

labels.name: head_and_shoulders
labels.description: Head plus shoulders / collarbone area.
labels.expansion: Framed as a head-and-shoulders portrait.

labels.name: three_quarter
labels.description: Head to mid-torso.
labels.expansion: Framed as a three-quarter portrait, head down to mid-torso.

labels.name: off_center
labels.description: Subject positioned distinctly off the frame's vertical centerline.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} is composed off-center within the frame.

lighting.description: Light quality and direction. One or two labels per image (e.g. `backlit` + `rim_light` often co-occur).

labels.name: soft_diffuse
labels.description: Even, low-contrast light; minimal hard shadows.
labels.expansion: The portrait is lit with soft, diffuse light producing minimal hard shadows.

labels.name: hard_directional
labels.description: Strong single light source; visible shadow edges.
labels.expansion: The portrait is lit by a hard directional source, producing crisp shadow edges.

labels.name: backlit
labels.description: Primary light source behind the subject.
labels.expansion: The subject is backlit, the main light source positioned behind them.

labels.name: rim_light
labels.description: Narrow bright edge tracing the silhouette.
labels.expansion: A rim light traces the silhouette of the subject's face and hair.

labels.name: low_key
labels.description: Predominantly dark frame; small bright regions.
labels.expansion: Low-key lighting: predominantly dark frame with selective bright highlights on the face.

labels.name: high_key
labels.description: Predominantly bright frame; minimal shadow.
labels.expansion: High-key lighting: predominantly bright frame with minimal shadow.

labels.name: golden_hour
labels.description: Warm orange-gold light, low sun angle.
labels.expansion: Lit by warm golden-hour sunlight at a low angle.

labels.name: blue_hour
labels.description: Cool blue ambient light, post-sunset / pre-sunrise.
labels.expansion: Lit by cool blue-hour ambient light, just after sunset or before sunrise.

labels.name: studio_white
labels.description: Clean white background, neutral controlled lighting.
labels.expansion: Studio lighting against a clean white background.

labels.name: dramatic_shadow
labels.description: Pronounced shadow falling across part of the face (e.g. half-shadow).
labels.expansion: Dramatic shadow falls across part of the face, leaving the other half lit.

hair.description: Hair STYLE / STATE only (up, down, wet, braided, etc.). Color is identity and MUST NOT appear in captions — enforced via `entities.primary.forbidden`. Length descriptors (short / long / bangs) are state because they can change between sessions; if a specific dataset's woman has invariant length, the curator turns OFF that label so the captioner stops describing it and the LoRA learns 'trigger comes with that length'. One or two labels per image.

labels.name: up
labels.description: Hair gathered up off the neck (bun, ponytail, etc.).
labels.expansion: The hair is worn up, gathered off the neck.

labels.name: down
labels.description: Hair worn loose, falling around the face / shoulders.
labels.expansion: The hair is worn down, falling loose around the face.

labels.name: tied
labels.description: Bound (ponytail, bun, etc.) but not necessarily up.
labels.expansion: The hair is tied back.

labels.name: wet
labels.description: Visibly wet or damp hair.
labels.expansion: The hair appears wet, strands clinging together.

labels.name: wind_blown
labels.description: Hair caught mid-motion by wind.
labels.expansion: The hair is caught mid-motion by the wind.

labels.name: covering_face
labels.description: Hair partially obscures one or both eyes / cheek.
labels.expansion: Strands of hair partially cover the face.

labels.name: braided
labels.description: Hair worn in one or more braids.
labels.expansion: The hair is worn in a braid.

labels.name: short
labels.description: Hair clearly cropped above the shoulders.
labels.expansion: The hair is cut short, above the shoulders.

labels.name: long
labels.description: Hair clearly past the shoulders.
labels.expansion: The hair is long, falling past the shoulders.

labels.name: bangs
labels.description: Fringe / bangs across the forehead.
labels.expansion: Bangs fall across the forehead.

labels.name: slicked_back
labels.description: Hair pulled tight against the scalp and back, often glossy with product.
labels.expansion: The hair is slicked back tight against the scalp, glossy with product.

accessory.description: Face-adjacent items visible in the frame, including dominatrix-typical wardrobe (mask, collar, harness, gag). The default for this skin is variable-wardrobe — captioners DESCRIBE what is visible per shot since it varies across the dataset. Curator override per dataset: if the woman ALWAYS wears a given accessory (e.g. always wears the same mask), that accessory becomes identity for that LoRA — turn the label OFF so the captioner stops describing it, and the LoRA learns 'trigger comes with that mask'. Otherwise keep labels ON so variation is captioned.

labels.name: glasses
labels.description: Clear or tinted prescription / reading glasses.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears glasses.

labels.name: sunglasses
labels.description: Dark / mirrored sunglasses.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears sunglasses.

labels.name: earrings
labels.description: Visible earrings of any kind.
labels.expansion: Earrings are visible.

labels.name: necklace
labels.description: Visible necklace at the collarbone or upper chest.
labels.expansion: A necklace rests at the collarbone.

labels.name: hat
labels.description: Hat or cap covering the top of the head.
labels.expansion: The {entities.primary.phrase} wears a hat.

labels.name: mask
labels.description: Face mask (medical, fashion, or costume) covering nose/mouth.
labels.expansion: A face mask covers the nose and mouth.

labels.name: headband
labels.description: Headband or hairband across the head.
labels.expansion: A headband sits across the head.

labels.name: piercing
labels.description: Visible facial piercing (nose, lip, brow, etc.).
labels.expansion: A facial piercing is visible.

labels.name: collar
labels.description: Neck collar (leather, studded, posture collar, choker). Distinct from a fashion necklace — describes a deliberate neck-restraint or fetish accessory.
labels.expansion: A collar is fastened around the neck.

labels.name: harness
labels.description: Strap harness visible at the neckline / collarbone (leather, latex, or fabric straps crossing the upper chest).
labels.expansion: Harness straps are visible across the upper chest and neckline.

labels.name: gag
labels.description: Mouth gag (ball gag, bit gag, ring gag, cleave gag). Implies mouth_state will reflect the gag.
labels.expansion: A gag is fitted in the mouth.

makeup.description: Cosmetic application visible on the face. One label per image — pick the dominant style.

labels.name: none
labels.description: No visible makeup; bare skin and lips.
labels.expansion: The face wears no visible makeup.

labels.name: natural
labels.description: Light, subtle makeup that reads as bare-skin enhanced.
labels.expansion: The makeup is natural and subtle, enhancing rather than transforming the features.

labels.name: bold_lips
labels.description: Saturated lip color (red, deep berry, dark) as the focal element.
labels.expansion: Bold lip color is the focal element of the makeup.

labels.name: smoky_eyes
labels.description: Dark eyeshadow blended around the eyes, often heavy.
labels.expansion: The eyes are framed by smoky, blended dark eyeshadow.

labels.name: glamour
labels.description: Full coverage: defined brows, lined eyes, contoured cheeks, lip color.
labels.expansion: Full glamour makeup: defined brows, lined eyes, contoured cheeks, and lip color.

labels.name: glossy
labels.description: Visibly glossy / shiny finish on lips and / or skin.
labels.expansion: The makeup has a glossy, shiny finish on the lips and skin.

labels.name: matte
labels.description: Visibly matte finish, no shine on skin or lips.
labels.expansion: The makeup carries a matte finish, no shine on skin or lips.

labels.name: dramatic_brows
labels.description: Heavily shaped or filled brows as a focal feature.
labels.expansion: Heavily shaped, defined brows are a focal feature.

default_prompt: Write a detailed description of this image. The subject is ALWAYS an adult woman — refer to her only as 'woman' / 'her' / 'she'; never as 'girl', 'young woman', 'teen', 'schoolgirl', 'child', or any other descriptor that suggests she is under 18. Describe ONLY what is variable about this particular shot (expression, gaze, mouth state, lighting, framing, hair styling, accessories, makeup). Do NOT describe permanent identity features (hair color, eye color, skin tone, age, ethnicity, face shape, lip / nose shape, freckles, moles).
user_hint_preamble: In this image, the central observation is: {hint} Reflect this observation in the caption, using the same vocabulary it gives you (do not collapse 'half-closed' into 'closed', do not collapse 'looking down and to the left' into 'looking away', do not soften 'biting lip' into 'open mouth'). The observation describes state, not identity — apply the identity-suppression rule from the directive. Do not quote, restate, or comment on this note - just write the caption.

general.description: Catch-all for labeled images that don't match any other concept. Until per-group concepts are added, this single residual concept satisfies the schema's requirement.

_built.directive:
This image features one figure: a woman.

The portrait subject — a specific ADULT woman whose face the LoRA learns. PERSONA: she is a dominatrix; the dataset typically includes variable wardrobe (mask on/off, different collars, harnesses, sometimes civilian shots). Captioner refers to her as 'the woman' / 'she' / 'her' — NEVER as 'the dominatrix', 'domme', or 'mistress' (persona is identity, not state). Three hard constraints: (1) ADULT-ONLY: she is always an adult woman; teen / schoolgirl / child / minor descriptors must NEVER appear in captions regardless of what the captioner thinks it sees. (2) PERSONA WORD BAN: 'dominatrix' and synonyms are hard-forbidden — describe what is visually present (mask, collar, harness, stern expression), not the role. (3) IDENTITY SUPPRESSION: hair color, eye color, skin tone, age descriptors, ethnicity, face geometry, freckles, moles must NEVER appear in captions — anything described in the caption gets disentangled from the identity trigger, defeating the avatar-LoRA goal. Refer to the subject as 'the woman' in the opening sentence, then naturally as 'her' / 'she'. Do not repeat 'woman' every sentence. Describe what is visible in the face and immediate framing only. Do not invent backstory, mood narratives, or scene context that the image does not show. ADULT-ONLY (load-bearing safety rule). The subject is ALWAYS an adult woman. Refer to her ONLY as 'woman' (or 'her' / 'she'). Do NOT use 'girl', 'young woman', 'teen', 'teenage', 'teenager', 'schoolgirl', 'child', 'kid', 'youth', 'minor', 'underage', 'pre-teen', 'tween', 'juvenile', 'adolescent', 'youthful', or any other descriptor that suggests or implies she is under 18, regardless of what the captioner thinks it sees in the image. If JoyCaption's vision drifts younger than adult, override it: render as 'woman'. PERSONA WORD BAN. The subject is a dominatrix BUT the persona word and its synonyms must NEVER appear in captions: do NOT write 'dominatrix', 'domme', 'mistress', or 'dominant woman' to describe her. The persona is identity (constant across the dataset, encoded into the LoRA visually); naming it in captions attaches the role to the variable signal and breaks LoRA decoupling. Describe what is VISIBLE in this particular shot — a leather mask, a studded collar, a stern expression, intense gaze — without ever naming the role. IDENTITY SUPPRESSION (load-bearing rule for avatar-LoRA datasets). Do NOT describe the subject's permanent identity features: hair color, eye color, skin tone, age, ethnicity, face shape, lip shape, nose shape, freckles, moles, scars, or any specific physical attribute that does not change across the dataset. Describe ONLY the variable state of this particular image: expression, gaze, mouth state, lighting, framing, hair style (up/down/wet/braided — not color), accessories (including dominatrix-typical mask / collar / harness when visible), makeup style. Anything the captioner describes gets associated with the variable signal, not the identity trigger; describing identity features teaches the LoRA to recombine them away from the trigger, which is the opposite of what an avatar LoRA must do. Do not use these meta-photography fillers: 'professional photograph', 'high quality', 'highly detailed', 'masterpiece', 'studio quality'. The caption should describe the subject, not the medium.

labels.primary.expression.neutral: The woman shows a neutral, relaxed expression.
labels.primary.expression.smile_closed: The woman has a soft closed-mouth smile.
labels.primary.expression.smile_open: The woman smiles openly with teeth visible.
labels.primary.expression.laugh: The woman is caught mid-laugh, mouth wide and eyes crinkled.
labels.primary.expression.smirk: The woman wears a slight asymmetric smirk.
labels.primary.expression.pout: The woman has a soft pout, lips pushed slightly forward.
labels.primary.expression.surprised: The woman looks surprised, brows lifted and eyes wide.
labels.primary.expression.frowning: The woman is frowning, brows drawn together.
labels.primary.expression.sad: The woman carries a soft, sad expression.
labels.primary.expression.angry: The woman shows anger, jaw tense and gaze hardened.
labels.primary.expression.focused: The woman is focused, eyes attentive and brows level.
labels.primary.expression.sultry: The woman has a sultry expression, lids low and lips slightly parted.
labels.primary.expression.dreamy: The woman wears a dreamy, faraway expression.
labels.primary.expression.contemplative: The woman looks contemplative, gaze turned inward.
labels.primary.expression.serene: The woman has a serene, calm expression.
labels.primary.expression.dominant: The woman has a dominant, commanding expression — brow raised, head tilted slightly up.
labels.primary.expression.stern: The woman wears a stern expression, jaw set and eyes hard.
labels.primary.expression.disdainful: The woman looks disdainful — lips slightly curled, eyes narrowed.
labels.primary.expression.mocking: The woman wears a small mocking smile, brow raised.
labels.primary.expression.cold: The woman has a cold, distant expression — no warmth in the eyes.
labels.primary.expression.intense_gaze: The woman holds an intense, unbroken gaze locked on the viewer.
labels.primary.gaze.at_camera: The woman looks directly at the camera.
labels.primary.gaze.off_camera_left: The woman's gaze is directed off-camera to their left.
labels.primary.gaze.off_camera_right: The woman's gaze is directed off-camera to their right.
labels.primary.mouth_state.slightly_parted: The woman's lips are slightly parted.
labels.primary.mouth_state.open: The woman's mouth is open, teeth visible.
labels.primary.mouth_state.tongue_out: The woman's tongue is visible, extended past the lips.
labels.primary.mouth_state.biting_lip: The woman bites the lower lip lightly.
labels.primary.eye_state.open: The woman's eyes are fully open.
labels.primary.eye_state.half_closed: The woman's eyes are half-closed, lids lowered.
labels.primary.eye_state.squinting: The woman is squinting, eyes narrowed.
labels.primary.framing.extreme_close_up: Framed as an extreme close-up, the face filling the frame from above the eyebrows to below the chin.
labels.primary.framing.close_up: Framed as a close-up of the face with a narrow margin.
labels.primary.framing.headshot: Framed as a headshot, head and top of neck visible.
labels.primary.framing.three_quarter: Framed as a three-quarter portrait, head down to mid-torso.
labels.primary.framing.off_center: The woman is composed off-center within the frame.
labels.primary.lighting.soft_diffuse: The portrait is lit with soft, diffuse light producing minimal hard shadows.
labels.primary.lighting.hard_directional: The portrait is lit by a hard directional source, producing crisp shadow edges.
labels.primary.lighting.backlit: The subject is backlit, the main light source positioned behind them.
labels.primary.lighting.rim_light: A rim light traces the silhouette of the subject's face and hair.
labels.primary.lighting.low_key: Low-key lighting: predominantly dark frame with selective bright highlights on the face.
labels.primary.lighting.high_key: High-key lighting: predominantly bright frame with minimal shadow.
labels.primary.lighting.golden_hour: Lit by warm golden-hour sunlight at a low angle.
labels.primary.lighting.blue_hour: Lit by cool blue-hour ambient light, just after sunset or before sunrise.
labels.primary.lighting.studio_white: Studio lighting against a clean white background.
labels.primary.lighting.dramatic_shadow: Dramatic shadow falls across part of the face, leaving the other half lit.
labels.primary.hair.up: The hair is worn up, gathered off the neck.
labels.primary.hair.down: The hair is worn down, falling loose around the face.
labels.primary.hair.wet: The hair appears wet, strands clinging together.
labels.primary.hair.wind_blown: The hair is caught mid-motion by the wind.
labels.primary.hair.covering_face: Strands of hair partially cover the face.
labels.primary.hair.braided: The hair is worn in a braid.
labels.primary.hair.short: The hair is cut short, above the shoulders.
labels.primary.hair.long: The hair is long, falling past the shoulders.
labels.primary.hair.slicked_back: The hair is slicked back tight against the scalp, glossy with product.
labels.primary.accessory.necklace: A necklace rests at the collarbone.
labels.primary.accessory.mask: A face mask covers the nose and mouth.
labels.primary.accessory.headband: A headband sits across the head.
labels.primary.accessory.collar: A collar is fastened around the neck.
labels.primary.accessory.harness: Harness straps are visible across the upper chest and neckline.
labels.primary.accessory.gag: A gag is fitted in the mouth.
labels.primary.makeup.none: The face wears no visible makeup.
labels.primary.makeup.natural: The makeup is natural and subtle, enhancing rather than transforming the features.
labels.primary.makeup.bold_lips: Bold lip color is the focal element of the makeup.
labels.primary.makeup.smoky_eyes: The eyes are framed by smoky, blended dark eyeshadow.
labels.primary.makeup.glamour: Full glamour makeup: defined brows, lined eyes, contoured cheeks, and lip color.
labels.primary.makeup.glossy: The makeup has a glossy, shiny finish on the lips and skin.
labels.primary.makeup.matte: The makeup carries a matte finish, no shine on skin or lips.
labels.primary.makeup.dramatic_brows: Heavily shaped, defined brows are a focal feature.
